calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing to Quiet Title this day. Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Atty. Kenneth C. Greene Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Peter Sal Fazio and Shari Ann Fazio. Plaintiff Peter Sal Fazio was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked and later on moved into evidence. Exh. 1- Quit claim deed dated March 3, 1994; Exh. 2-Grant deed; Exh. 3- Grant Deed-transfer of property to Catherine Kortin;
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants that title to the subject property described as 1350 Pine Street, San Francisco, CA is hereby quieted as against all defendants named herein.(See scanned judgment for details). Judgment signed in open court.
